22 struct Errors : public franka::Errors {
23  Errors() noexcept : franka::Errors() {}
24  Errors(const franka::Errors &other) noexcept : franka::Errors(other) {}
25  Errors(const Errors &other) noexcept : franka::Errors(other) {}
26  Errors &operator=(const Errors &other) noexcept {
27  franka::Errors::operator=(other);
28  return *this;
29  }
30 };

42  const franka::RobotState &robot_state, std::optional<Vector7d> q_est = std::nullopt,

48  const franka::RobotState &robot_state, const Jacobian &ee_jacobian, const Vector7d &q_est, const Vector7d &dq_est,
49  const Vector7d &ddq_est);
